NIST SP 800-53 Encryption at Rest Clause

Primary keyword: NIST SP 800-53 encryption at rest clause template

Best for: Government vendors and security teams

Source reference: NIST SP 800-53 Rev. 5 reference

Get the Full Library

Plain-English Summary

This kit helps Government vendors and security teams create a practical starting point for encryption at rest clause under NIST SP 800-53. It can be adapted for policies, website notices, client deliverables, trust-center pages, and compliance binders.

Free Preview Clause

Regulated data stored in production systems, backups, and managed databases is protected using strong encryption with separated key management.

Where This Is Used

Use this in security policies, vendor due-diligence responses, and customer-facing security pages.

Checklist Preview

  • Identify covered data stores
  • Confirm encryption is enabled
  • Separate keys from data

Common Mistakes

  • Only encrypting production and ignoring backups
  • No key ownership record
  • No rotation plan

Full Paid Kit Includes

  • Website notice version
  • Internal policy version
  • Implementation checklist
  • Evidence and audit notes
  • Related templates
  • Metadata and verification hash

Related Templates

  • NIST SP 800-53 Access Control Policy Clause
  • NIST SP 800-53 Encryption in Transit Clause
  • NIST SP 800-53 Audit Logging Clause
  • NIST SP 800-53 Incident Response Notice Clause
  • NIST SP 800-53 Data Retention Clause
  • NIST SP 800-53 Vendor Management Clause

Disclaimer

These templates are for informational and operational planning use only. They are not legal advice, do not create an attorney-client relationship, and should be reviewed by qualified counsel before relying on them for compliance.
